description: Unlinked public review build of the Audio Jacobian Lens, with full cached explorers, an optional fitted phone-signature view for ASR encoder states, and curated findings pages.
interaction_boundary: The primary pages provide static sample selection, cleared-input playback, synchronized waveform/token/layer selection, cell-local hover and keyboard detail, and click-pinned candidate inspection. ASR uses exact 100 ms encoder windows with 20 ms overlap and an 80 ms hop across all ten cached examples, and adds a toggleable fitted phone-signature view whose cells show the top phone prototype and whose local detail shows five candidates. Its lexical and phone encoder modes share one contained horizontal scroller, and its decoder keeps the complete emitted sequence in a second contained scroller. Any token, waveform, encoder, decoder, or HEAD selection updates the shared coordinate and reveals the synchronized columns inside both scrollers without moving the page. Decoder cells show the top lexical candidate plus the realized-token rank and expose five candidates in detail. Character-length reranking, readable eight-token speech-to-speech bands, TTS diagnostics, and recorded intervention inspection remain cached interactions. No model inference, upload, recording, generation, or intervention endpoint is present.
media_policy: Only the ten CC BY 4.0 LibriSpeech input FLACs are included. Generated LFM and Chatterbox audio remains excluded pending derived-output review.
payload_policy: Each detailed family manifest pins model/lens provenance and hashes ten reduced reports. ASR uses a speaker-held-out A2 encoder lens plus frozen train-only phone prototypes; all encoder reports and filter sidecars were recomputed at five-state 100 ms pooling with one-state overlap and a 100-bin safety limit. Reports publish only five bounded phone candidates per encoder cell and exclude prototype tensors, occurrence-level rows, private paths, ephemeral server IDs, and embedded audio. Character-length buckets remain separate hash-pinned files loaded only when enabled.
